rationale: The citing paper models long-term effects of discounting using scanner data and dynamic equations, while the cited paper is a methodological contribution on pre/postpromotion dips and distributed lead-lag promotion effects in store-level scanner data. Given this strong construct/method overlap (promotion dynamics in scanner data), the citation is plausibly a substantive mechanism/method source rather than an obvious incidental mention, even though the raw evidence only provides a DOI match.
